subcodes.first_line: There hath never been nor is there any doubt that the purpose of creation hath ever been the recognition and praise of the Beloved of all worlds, and inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکی نبوده و نیست که مقصود از آفرینش عرفان و ستایش محبوب عالم بوده و چون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose; goal of creation
